creator: kp@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Aleksandr Fedorov from comment #2)
That looks a lot like PR 254419, but that should be fixed by  https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/?id=b93a796b06ec013a75a08ac43d8acf6aa94aa970

Mark, do we also need to mb_unmapped_to_ext() in pf_check_proto_checksum() when called in the TX path?
